## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Related Issue

Link the issue this PR addresses, if there is one.

## Testing

- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] `dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs` if codegen changed

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or screen recordings for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My change follows the repo's code style
- [ ] Generated files are committed if needed
- [ ] I updated documentation if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] I tested the change locally
